nasb.text: Moreover, the manufacturers of linen made from combed flax And the weavers of white cloth will be utterly dejected.

esv.text: The workers in combed flax will be in despair, and the weavers of white cotton.

cnv.text: 那些用梳好的麻來紡紗的， 和那些織白布的，都必羞愧。

ccb.text: 纺纱织布的人一筹莫展， 感到绝望。

csbs.text: 绩麻的和织白布的都必蒙羞，
